calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #10, REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar Apr-09-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Mark Weaver for City National Bank (Petitioner).

Counsel addressed fees. The accounting petition was taken under submission.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Allen. (Not Reported)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Transfer To Maryland And Filing Of A Final Account
Off Calendar Feb-24-2014 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Transfer To Maryland And Filing Of A Final Account
Off Calendar Dec-16-2013 Continued To Feb-24-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING , REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar Aug-12-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Mark Weaver for Cit National Bank (Petitioner/Trustee).

The Court stated that it does not have a problem with most of the relief requested but that it has concerns about the Attorney's fees which are quite high. Mr. Weaver explained that they reduced their fees, that there was a period of time in which they assisted the Beneficiary in obtaining military benefits, that they coordinated with the Beneficiaries Mother and her legal team to begin the process of moving the matter to Maryland, and that their fee request was reasonable. The accounting petition was taken under submission for the issue of Attorney's fees. Status on transfer to Maryland and filing of a final account was set for December 16, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy M. Benton. (Not Reported)
